inputFieldValues.title: inputFieldValues
inputFieldValues.description: A list of field API names and their corresponding values passed into the update quote line item details request. Each entry must use "key" for the field API name and "obj" for the field value

quoteId.title: quoteId
quoteId.description: The ID of the quote record.

quoteLineItemId.title: quoteLineItemId
quoteLineItemId.description: The ID of the quote line item record.
